title: pavonia urens var. hirsuta
intro: Pavonia urens var. hirsuta, also known as the hairy clustervine or hairy rockmallow, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to treat skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Pavonia urens var. hirsuta include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of this plant have been used in the form of infusions, salves, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
